text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion and I head into our second summer
camp.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I can do this! Raaagh!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But of course! After all...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This is the year I shall realize my goal of trying
every kind of ramen at the beach house!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Surely you understand that eating nothing but
ramen is unacceptable from a nutritional
standpoint.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why I couldn't complete my ramen
conquest last year. Not only that, we have a race
in the middle of this summer camp, correct?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That makes the road to ramen conquest harsher
yet. However, I have a secret plan!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I call it... the "Can I have a bite?" approach! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's one of the many things I've learned at the
academy! If everyone shares their food, then I'll
be able to try every variety on offer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And that is why I would like to request your
cooperation. ♪
choice_data_list: If you work hard at training, I'll consider it.
If you work hard at training, I'll consider it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Certainly! That goes without saying!
Oh...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Looks like you're not wavering anymore.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You're playing your role exactly as written.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right. Apologies, but I can't become a god.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I will, however, perform my role with aplomb. I'll
run in such a way as to set your heart dancing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If I can do that... maybe I can at least become an
angel.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Are you stupid or something?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Who needs gods or angels? If you won't do it...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'll just have to take care of it myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, the reason Air Shakur is so fixated on
Fine Motion remains unclear. However...
choice_data_list: It looks like she's made up her mind.
It looks like she's made up her mind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'm sure she'll face any obstacle head-on and
power through.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I, too, must work hard and become stronger!
